2317610.name: Demon Tormentor
2317610.description: A girl in a desperate situation summons a demon to save her father, but the ritual goes terribly wrong. Now she seeks help from an experienced occult investigator. Perform magic rituals, avoid hidden dangers, look for secrets, and gather artifacts as you shoot demons and monsters in this dark and immersive underground VR action-adventure shooter.
2317610.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
